name: insane-search-codex
description: Codex-native auto-bypass for blocked sites (X/Twitter, Reddit, Stack Overflow, Naver, Coupang, LinkedIn, YouTube) — Phase 0→3 adaptive scheduler with curl_cffi TLS impersonation, yt-dlp, Jina, public APIs, and local Playwright fallback. No API keys, auto dependency install.

interface.shortDescription: Bypass blocked or difficult web pages in Codex
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `insane-search` skill with the generic fetch engine, platform-specific references, and runnable smoke tests for blocked or WAF-heavy URLs.
defaultPrompt: Use insane-search to fetch this blocked article and show the trace route it used.
Search a WAF-heavy site and fall back to the local engine when normal web access fails.
Run the insane-search engine against this URL and summarize what path succeeded.
